blended.narrative: Waterville Valley is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.1 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,353 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
